{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_a",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:8,saturation:0.5f,max_stack_size:16,flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"没有你想的那么绵密丝滑"},{at_ticks:34,text:"反而因为是炼乳块"},{at_ticks:62,text:"奶香味浓的有些腻歪"},{at_ticks:92,text:"香甜的有些齁人"},{at_ticks:118,text:"不管怎么说"},{at_ticks:140,text:"总算是有点东西下肚了"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_a"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_b",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:8,saturation:0.5f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:-3,water_delta:0,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"压缩饼干"},{at_ticks:20,text:"....."},{at_ticks:42,text:"罐头"},{at_ticks:58,text:"有的吃就不错了"},{at_ticks:84,text:"很干"},{at_ticks:100,text:"很硬"},{at_ticks:116,text:"没有什么调味"},{at_ticks:140,text:"也干噎得慌"},{at_ticks:162,text:"不过幸好不是很让人口干舌燥"},{at_ticks:200,text:"费水"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_b"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_c",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:12,saturation:0.4166666666666667f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:2,water_delta:0,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"红烧肉！好扎实的分量"},{at_ticks:32,text:"但是肉真的好肥"},{at_ticks:58,text:"不行了"},{at_ticks:76,text:"给我吃腻歪到了"},{at_ticks:102,text:"太油太肥了"},{at_ticks:124,text:"或许用来炖汤是一个不错的选择"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_c"}

{firstpersonfoodeating_profile:{food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_d",use_duration_ticks:132,nutrition:8,saturation:0.25f,max_stack_size:16,thirst:{delta:2,water_delta:4,mode:"always"},flavor_messages:{mode:"actionbar",pick:"random_weighted",cooldown_ticks:0,groups:[{id:"default",weight:1,segments:[{at_ticks:0,text:"扎了一勺子水蜜桃塞嘴里"},{at_ticks:34,text:"清香"},{at_ticks:50,text:"微甜"},{at_ticks:66,text:"水蜜桃的果香伴随着汁水弥漫唇齿"},{at_ticks:108,text:"能与之相匹配的或许也只有黄桃罐头了"}]}]}},food_id:"firstpersonfoodeating:i_guantou_d"}
